rationale: X independently surfaces the same core concern dsocek raised in the ground truth (the hardcoded per-manager component list should instead be derived from existing per-pipeline metadata, here _dit_modules vs. dsocek's _packed_modules_mapping) and adds a grounded, plausible follow-up about text-encoder LoRA being a silent no-op — both concrete, file/line-anchored, and actionable. Y is a pure validation/scan report that confirms correctness point-by-point but raises zero substantive concerns matching the ground truth, ending in APPROVE with nothing actionable for the author to change.
